deviations.description: The process model enforces that both physical examination and blood test must precede diagnosis, while Version 2 permits diagnosis without these prerequisites. The process unnecessarily restricts behavior by requiring steps that are no longer mandatory.
The process model requires a blood test before diagnosis, but Version 2 removes this obligation. The process continues to enforce an outdated constraint.
process_model_reference: Draw Blood Samples, Blood Analysis Requested, Blood Analysis Results

deviations.description: The process model requires a physical examination before diagnosis, but Version 2 no longer mandates this. The process enforces a step that is now optional.
